content.problemStatement:
You are given a matrix AAA of integers. Your task is to write a program to calculate and print the sum of each row and each column of the matrix.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains two integers, MMM and NNN, representing the number of rows and columns in the matrix, respectively.
The next MMM lines contain NNN integers each, representing the elements of the matrix.


Output Format

On the first line, print the sum of each row, separated by spaces.
On the second line, print the sum of each column, separated by spaces.
